diff --git a/document/docker/docker-compose-env.yml b/document/docker/docker-compose-env.yml
index 88f60744e5..5cf9b4f5c3 100644
--- a/document/docker/docker-compose-env.yml
+++ b/document/docker/docker-compose-env.yml
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ services:
     ports:
       - 80:80
   rabbitmq:
-    image: rabbitmq:3.9-management
+    image: rabbitmq:3.9.11-management
     container_name: rabbitmq
     volumes:
       - /mydata/rabbitmq/data:/var/lib/rabbitmq #数据文件挂载

  Target Server Version : 50719
  File Encoding         : 65001
 
- Date: 16/02/2023 15:27:21
+ Date: 11/05/2023 15:48:15
 */
 
 SET NAMES utf8mb4;

   `read_count` int(1) NULL DEFAULT NULL,
   `content` text CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL,
   PRIMARY KEY (`id`) USING BTREE
-) ENGINE = InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT = 1 CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_general_ci COMMENT = '帮助表' ROW_FORMAT = Dynamic;
+) ENGINE = InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT = 1 CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_general_ci COMMENT = '帮助表' ROW_FORMAT = DYNAMIC;
